name: media-download-system
description: Cross-platform authorized media downloader with web, desktop, extension, mobile, and backend packages.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @media/web && npm run build -w @media/backend
scripts.package: npm run build -w @media/web && npm run package:win -w @media/desktop
scripts.apk:build: npm run build -w @media/web && npx -w @media/web cap sync android
